raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas staigaja weenumebr
starp teem Lauwahm/ ktua par
iaunu Lauwu/un mahztjahs Lau-
ptjumu laupiht/ wiꞥſch aprihje
Zilwekus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch atsinne winnu At-
raitnes/ un pobstija winnu Pils-
tahtus/ ta ka ta Semme un kas
eeſch tahs irr/ no winna Ruhk-
chanas istrubztinajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs prett winnu
tahs Tautas apkahrt no tahm
Walstiun/un isplehte fawn Tihek-
i pahr winnu/ winnu Bedre
tappe tas guhſthts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee likke winnu Pinnek-
lôs un Schkehdes/ ka tee win-
nu westu us to Kehnizu no Ba-
veles/ tee wedde winnu Stipru-
môs/ ka winna Balfs ne tappe
wairs dsirdeta us Israêta Kal-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tava Mahte btja ka
weens Wiha-Kohks/kamehr tu
rahms bijt/ dehstita pee Uhdens/
winna Auglis un winna Stih-
gas usange no leela Uhdens/un
winnam bij stipri Sarri/ kas par
Szeptereem to Walditaju derrez-
ja/ un tas Refn-Gals iklatras
Needras tappe angsts starp teem
Sarreem/ un tappe redschts
aur fawn Augstumu/ ar fawn
Sarro Pulka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winſch tappe ar
Bahrsibu isplehsts/ un pee Sem-
nes mests/un tas Rihta Wehjsch
r winna Anglus kaltejs/ win-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu irr tas weena
Tuḱnesi dehſthts/ weena kalnu-
scha un istwihkutchâ Semmê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ugguns irr islehzis
no weena winno Stihgu Sar-
reem/ un irr winna Augtus ap-
ehdis/ ta ka pee winna nekahds
stiprs Sars irr par Szepteri/ fchi
irr weena Randu-Dseefma/ un
irr par Schehlofchanu tappuft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XX. Nodalla.
Ezekiels stahsta teem Laudim tahs leelas Lab-
badaṙriſchanas/ ko Deews winneem un win-
nu Tehweem parahdijs: 1/3. Un ki nepa-
klaufigi tee turreiſcheeg: 8/13. Tapchts
Deews tohs jawâ Bahrsibâ sohdihs: 34.
Bet jawus Iswehletus eekſch Israêta us-
turrehs: 40.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas notiffahs feptita
Gaddâ peektâ Mehneſi/
deſmitâ Deenâ tahs
Mehnes/ tad nahze zitti Wihti
no Israêta Wezzajeein to KUNG-
Ell waizaht/ un aptehdahs man-
ná Preekschâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad notifke ta KUNGA
Wahrds us man/ kas fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behruns/ run-
na us Jraêta Wezzajeein/ un
fakki us tein: Ta fakka tas
Kungs KUNGS: Eſtat juhs
nahkusch manni waizaht? tik
teescham ka es dsihwoju/ fakka
tas Kungs KUNGS: Es ne
gribbu no juhs waizahs tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gribbi tu tohs fohtiht?
gribbi tu tohs fohtiht tu Zilwe-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
